assertions.assertion: Uses WebApplicationFactory<Program> with ConfigureTestServices to override IdentityServer registration
Sets options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false to avoid disk writes in CI
assertions.rationale: Explicitly sets options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false with comment about CI.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) for a static test signing key
assertions.rationale: .AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) with comment 'not persisted to disk'.

assertions.assertion: Registers clients via AddInMemoryClients — no sub-documents needed for this core pattern
assertions.rationale: .AddInMemoryClients with inline Client definition using GrantTypes.ClientCredentials.
